creator: vsasjason@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Daniel Engberg from comment #2)

Actually this has been raised a multiple times already, but I don't mind commenting once more:
1. For the release archive, I really want to see review D37929 merged (I also put a comment there why this is important). I would strongly prefer to not change existing method unless a) revision will be officially marked as Abandoned or GitHub will announce that actual archive format will be changed, as they promised to do 6 months ahead in no. 2 of [0].
2. We cannot unbundle httplib as it's broken (commit 49709c91cf5f32ae17b3f2d576928a604289959f) on 13.x (which is still supported) due to versions=>0.15 requiring OpenSSL 3.

[0]: https://github.com/orgs/community/discussions/46034#discussion-4814038
